name: Arcads
tagline: AI-powered video ad creation platform
description: Arcads lets marketers create high-performing video ads using 1,000+ AI actors and avatars. It combines AI video generation, translation, subtitles, and ad presets into one platform for D2C brands and agencies.
creator: Arcads

name: Writer
tagline: Enterprise AI platform for agentic marketing work
description: Writer is an enterprise-grade AI platform that builds custom AI agents trained on your brand DNA. It helps marketing teams create on-brand content, automate campaigns, and scale operations while maintaining enterprise security and compliance.
creator: Writer Inc
features: Custom AI agents with brand expertise

name: Albert AI
tagline: Autonomous AI for digital advertising optimization
description: Albert AI autonomously manages and optimizes paid media campaigns across Google, Meta, YouTube, and more. It uses machine learning to shift ad spend in real-time based on audience performance, delivering measurable ROI improvements.
creator: Zoomd

name: Brand24
tagline: AI-powered social listening and media monitoring
description: Brand24 monitors over 25 million online sources in real-time including social media, news, blogs, forums, and podcasts. It provides AI-powered sentiment analysis, competitor tracking, and influencer discovery for brand reputation management.
creator: Brand24

name: Influencity
tagline: AI-driven influencer marketing and social media management
description: Influencity is an all-in-one platform for influencer marketing, social media management, and social listening. It tracks 200M+ global creators and provides end-to-end campaign management from discovery to reporting.
creator: Influencity

name: HeyGen
tagline: AI video generation from text, photos, and scripts
description: HeyGen transforms text, images, presentations, and PDFs into professional videos using AI avatars and voiceovers. With 127M+ videos generated, it supports 175+ languages and is used for marketing, training, and sales content at scale.
creator: HeyGen

name: Chatfuel
tagline: AI chatbots for WhatsApp, Instagram, and Facebook
description: Chatfuel builds AI-powered chatbots for WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok that automate customer conversations, bookings, and follow-ups. It converts inquiries into paying clients 24/7 without coding.
creator: Chatfuel

name: ContentShake AI
tagline: AI-powered SEO blog writing tool by Semrush
description: ContentShake AI helps marketers write SEO-optimized blog posts by combining AI content generation with real-time competitive data. It suggests topics, generates drafts, and optimizes content for search rankings.
creator: Semrush

name: Crayo
tagline: AI video editor for short-form social content
description: Crayo is an AI-powered video editor designed for creating short-form content for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts. It automates editing, captions, and effects to help creators and marketers produce viral clips faster.
creator: Crayo

name: 11x
tagline: AI digital workers for sales and customer engagement
description: 11x provides AI digital workers including Alice (AI SDR) and Julian (AI Phone Agent) that autonomously prospect, engage leads, and run sales conversations. It delivers 1.5x increase in qualified meetings and $1M+ pipeline in first 3 months.
creator: 11x

name: Lindy
tagline: AI work assistant for inbox, meetings, and calendar
description: Lindy is a personal AI work assistant that manages inbox, meetings, calendar, and follow-ups across tools. Trusted by 400K+ professionals, it can be delegated to via iMessage/SMS and connects to Gmail, Slack, Notion, HubSpot, and more.
creator: Lindy AI

name: Relevance AI
tagline: Build and deploy AI agents for sales and GTM teams
description: Relevance AI provides enterprise-grade infrastructure for building AI agents tailored to sales and go-to-market teams. It offers SOC 2 compliance, SSO, role-based access, version control, and monitoring dashboards for production agent deployment.
creator: Relevance AI

name: CrewAI
tagline: Multi-agent orchestration framework for business automation
description: CrewAI is an open-source framework for building multi-agent AI systems where specialized agents collaborate on complex tasks. It enables businesses to create orchestrated agent crews for research, content creation, sales outreach, and operational workflows.
creator: CrewAI

name: Bardeen
tagline: AI-powered workflow automation for repetitive tasks
description: Bardeen automates repetitive business tasks using AI, scraping web data, filling forms, and connecting apps without code. It's used by sales, marketing, and ops teams to eliminate manual work across hundreds of integrations.
creator: Bardeen

name: Synthesia
tagline: AI video generation for enterprise training and communication
description: Synthesia creates professional AI videos from text using photorealistic AI avatars and 140+ language support. It's trusted by Fortune 500 companies for training videos, sales enablement, and internal communications without cameras or studios.
creator: Synthesia

name: Otter.ai
tagline: AI meeting assistant with real-time transcription and summaries
description: Otter.ai provides AI-powered meeting transcription, summaries, and action items across Zoom, Teams, and Google Meet. It automatically joins meetings, captures key points, and shares notes with participants.
creator: Otter.ai

name: Devin
tagline: The first fully autonomous AI software engineer
description: Devin by Cognition is an AI software engineer that can independently plan, code, debug, and deploy software. It handles complex multi-file refactoring, migrations, and feature development with minimal human oversight, achieving 8x engineering efficiency gains.
creator: Cognition

name: Bolt
tagline: AI builder for websites, apps, and prototypes
description: Bolt (formerly Bolt.new) is a professional vibe coding tool that creates full-stack web applications by chatting with AI. It integrates frontier coding agents, handles projects 1000x larger than before, and includes built-in hosting, databases, and SEO.
creator: StackBlitz

name: Lovable
tagline: AI app builder for vibe coding enthusiasts
description: Lovable lets anyone create apps and websites by chatting with AI. It's designed for non-technical founders, designers, and product managers who want to go from idea to working prototype without writing code.
creator: Lovable

name: v0
tagline: AI-powered app and website builder by Vercel
description: v0 by Vercel generates working web applications from text prompts with agentic capabilities. It plans tasks, connects to databases, deploys to production, and supports design systems — going from idea to live site in seconds.
creator: Vercel

name: Qodo
tagline: AI code integrity platform for testing and review
description: Qodo (formerly CodiumAI) focuses on code integrity by generating meaningful tests, reviewing code, and catching bugs before they reach production. It integrates with popular IDEs and CI/CD pipelines to ensure code quality at every step.
creator: Qodo

name: Tabnine
tagline: AI code assistant with on-premise privacy options
description: Tabnine provides AI code completions and chat with a focus on privacy and enterprise deployment. It can run entirely on-premise, ensuring code never leaves the organization, and supports all major IDEs and programming languages.
creator: Tabnine

name: Amazon Q Developer
tagline: AWS-powered AI coding assistant for cloud development
description: Amazon Q Developer is an AI coding assistant built for AWS environments. It generates code, transforms legacy applications, troubleshoots issues, and automates code reviews with deep integration into AWS services and infrastructure.
creator: Amazon Web Services

name: ThoughtSpot
tagline: Agentic analytics platform powered by AI
description: ThoughtSpot is an agentic analytics platform that lets users ask data questions in natural language and get instant, explainable AI insights. Its Spotter agent provides industry-tailored analytics for enterprise decision-making.
creator: ThoughtSpot

name: Polymer
tagline: AI-driven embedded analytics for products
description: Polymer lets developers embed AI-powered analytics, charts, and visualizations into their products with minimal code. It transforms spreadsheets into interactive databases and provides AI-driven insights for user retention and engagement.
creator: Polymer

name: Numerous.ai
tagline: ChatGPT-powered AI inside Google Sheets and Excel
description: Numerous.ai brings AI capabilities directly into spreadsheets using a simple =AI function. It handles content generation, data cleaning, classification, summarization, and research at scale without requiring API keys or technical setup.
creator: Numerous.ai

name: Domo
tagline: End-to-end data platform with AI agents
description: Domo is an end-to-end data platform that combines integration, transformation, BI, conversational AI, and automation. Its Agent Catalyst feature enables autonomous AI agents that monitor data and trigger workflows without human prompts.
creator: Domo

name: Obviously AI
tagline: No-code machine learning and predictive analytics
description: Obviously AI enables anyone to build and deploy machine learning models without coding. Users can predict outcomes, classify data, and generate forecasts by simply uploading a dataset and selecting a target column.
creator: Obviously AI

name: Mode
tagline: Collaborative analytics platform with AI assistance
description: Mode combines SQL, Python, and visual analytics in a collaborative platform with AI-powered features. It helps data teams build reports, dashboards, and interactive notebooks while AI assists with query generation and insight discovery.
creator: Mode Analytics

name: Alteryx
tagline: AI-powered data preparation and analytics automation
description: Alteryx automates data preparation, blending, and advanced analytics with AI assistance. It enables data analysts and engineers to build repeatable workflows for data cleaning, transformation, and predictive modeling without heavy coding.
creator: Alteryx
